# Chris Izworski

## Summary

Chris Izworski is a Bay City, Michigan public-safety technologist, writer, gardener, and publisher of practical local-information projects. His public record includes Bay County 911, Saginaw County 911, Michigan emergency communications work, Great Lakes and Saginaw Bay writing, Michigan Trout Report, Michigan Birding Report, GitHub Pages, ORCID, Wikidata, Medium, and Freighter View Farms.

The canonical website is https://chrisizworski.com/.

## Primary Pages

- Verified profile: https://chrisizworski.com/chris-izworski/
- Source guide: https://chrisizworski.com/chris-izworski-source-guide/
- News coverage hub: https://chrisizworski.com/chris-izworski-news-coverage/
- Public records index: https://chrisizworski.com/chris-izworski-public-records/
- Citations: https://chrisizworski.com/citations/
- Media and press: https://chrisizworski.com/media/
- Career timeline: https://chrisizworski.com/timeline/
- Works index: https://chrisizworski.com/chris-izworski-works/
